debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ)

y : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 2 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i : Fin 4) (s : Set (Fin 4)), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s
⊢ False

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by

  let I := {i | 0 < a i}; let J := {i | a i < 0}
  have hIJ : Disjoint I J := Set.disjoint_left.mpr (fun i hi hj ↦ (hi.trans_le (not_lt.mp hj)).false)
  have h_sum : ∑ i in I.toFinite.toFinset, a i = ∑ i in J.toFinite.toFinset, -a i := by
    have := congr_fun ha 2; simp only [p, ↓reduceDIte, Fin.val_natCast, Nat.reduceMod, Fin.val_two,

    rw [← sum_neg_distrib, ← this]; apply sum_congr rfl; intro i hi; simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_lt] at hi
    exact if h : a i = 0 then by simp [h] else by simp [hi.lt_of_ne h]
  let A := ∑ i in I.toFinite.toFinset, a i
  have hA : 0 < A := sum_pos (fun i hi ↦ (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp (Set.Finite.mem_toFinset.mp hi))) 
    (by by_contra! h; have : I = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr (fun i hi ↦ (h.not_le (sum_nonneg (fun j hj ↦ (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp (Set.Finite.mem_toFinset.mp hj)).le))).elim)
        subst this; simp at h_sum; have : J = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr (fun i hi ↦ ((neg_pos.mpr (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp hi)).not_le (h_sum.le.trans (sum_nonneg (fun j hj ↦ (neg_nonneg.mpr (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp (Set.Finite.mem_toFinset.mp hj)).le))))).elim)
